channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Report: Trump Expresses Anger After Israeli Airstrikes Potentially Jeopardize U.S.-Iran Agreement
item.description: According to a report cited by Axios journalist Barak Ravid, President Donald Trump reacted angrily to Israel's latest military action, which threatened to complicate ongoing diplomatic efforts involv...

item.title: Government warns immigration tensions and xenophobia concerns are harming South Africa’s international reputation
item.description: Justice and Constitutional Development Minister Mmamoloko Kubayi has warned that growing tensions and anti-migrant sentiment in South Africa are beginning to damage the country’s international reputat...

item.title: Alex Vindman highlights Senate campaign against Ashley Moody during Trump's birthday amid Florida race
item.description: The article reports on former Army lieutenant colonel Alex Vindman leveraging Donald Trump’s birthday to draw attention to his U.S. Senate campaign in Florida. Vindman, a key witness in Trump’s first ...

item.title: North West innovator builds biosecurity drone system to help poultry farmers detect disease early
item.description: A young innovator from South Africa’s North West province, Gaoagwe Jeje, has developed a drone-based system aimed at improving disease detection and biosecurity in poultry farming. His invention, know...

item.title: Sen. Mitch McConnell Hospitalized Again Amid Ongoing Health Concerns
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell, the U.S. Senate Minority Leader and Republican senator from Kentucky, has been hospitalized again, marking the second such incident since February, according to reports confirmed...

item.title: Military Honor Guards Participate in UFC Event Press Conference at Lincoln Memorial
item.description: A significant controversy erupted online following a UFC promotional event at the Lincoln Memorial in Washington, D.C., on June 12, 2026. Uniformed U.S. military honor guards from the National Guard w...

item.title: Fourteen-year-old Unathi Nkuta makes professional ballet debut in a principal role with Mzansi Ballet
item.description: Unathi Nkuta, a 14-year-old Grade 8 learner at Reddam House Bedfordview, has reached a significant milestone in her ballet career by making her professional debut in a principal role with Mzansi Balle...

item.title: Queensland Government Commits Additional Funding to Great Barrier Reef Conservation Efforts
item.description: The Queensland state government has announced a multimillion-dollar funding commitment aimed at supporting the preservation and long-term protection of the Great Barrier Reef. According to the article...

item.title: Arizona Democratic Candidate Alleges Foreign-Funded AI Text Campaign Influenced Primary Election
item.description: Noah Kai Newkirk, an activist and Democratic candidate for Congress in Arizona, has submitted a formal complaint to Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes alleging that a foreign government interfered in...

item.title: Severe Weather, High Humidity, and Insects May Disrupt UFC Freedom 250 at the White House
item.description: A UFC event promoted by President Donald Trump, known as UFC Freedom 250, was scheduled to take place outdoors on the White House South Lawn as part of celebrations connected to the United States' 250...

item.title: Columnist Criticizes Trump's Washington Redesign Projects as Excessive and Historically Symbolic
item.description: A political opinion column by analyst and trial attorney Sabrina Haake criticizes President Donald Trump's efforts to redesign and reshape parts of Washington, D.C., arguing that the projects reflect ...

item.title: Kathy Kiuna Shares How Bishop Allan Kiuna Accepted Her and Her Daughter Before They Married
item.description: Lady Bishop Kathy Kiuna shared her personal testimony during the eighth annual women’s conference organised by Phaneroo Ministries International in Naguru, Uganda. The event, inspired by 1 Peter 3:4, ...

item.title: NBC News poll shows Democrats with slight advantage in 2026 House control preference
item.description: A new NBC News national poll has raised concerns for Republicans as the 2026 U.S. midterm elections approach, showing Democrats with a modest but notable advantage in voter preference for control of C...

item.title: Report highlights potential conflict of interest involving Trump family crypto business and UFC fighter payments
item.description: A report published by The Guardian, as cited in the Raw Story article, raises concerns about a potential conflict of interest linking President Donald Trump’s family financial interests to an upcoming...

item.title: Chris Tate’s 'The Bunker' in Piha Wins Design Awards for Its Innovative Response to a Harsh Coastal Environment
item.description: Architect Chris Tate designed an unconventional beach house in Piha, New Zealand, that challenges traditional ideas of coastal architecture. Known as 'The Bunker,' the project was developed in close c...

item.title: Durban to Pietermaritzburg road closures confirmed for 99th Comrades Marathon
item.description: The eThekwini Municipality has issued an advisory detailing extensive road closures ahead of the 99th Comrades Marathon, scheduled for Sunday, 14 June 2026. The iconic ultra-marathon, known as the Ult...

item.title: Court-Ordered Removal of Trump's Name From Kennedy Center Sparks Political Debate
item.description: A political controversy surrounding the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts intensified after crews removed President Donald Trump's name from the building following a federal court order. ...

item.title: Political scientist warns of increased risks in Trump's presidency amid concerns over age and decision-making
item.description: A political science expert has raised concerns about President Donald Trump’s leadership as he approaches 80 years of age, warning that the United States may be entering a “frightening” two-year perio...

item.title: Opinion columnist argues White House UFC event could create political backlash for Trump
item.description: This opinion article by Jason Miciak argues that President Donald Trump's planned UFC event on the White House South Lawn represents a significant political gamble with little potential benefit and su...

item.title: Democrat Criticizes Republican Effort to Block Tax Enforcement on Private Jets Using Safety Data
item.description: Rep. Ted Lieu (D-CA) criticized Republicans for including a provision in an air-safety bill that would prevent tax authorities from using aircraft tracking data to enforce property, sales, and use tax...
